aggregation_contract.bond_within_record: each unique undirected bond has equal weight within its record
aggregation_contract.record_within_molecule: arithmetic mean; one or two validation records per molecule
aggregation_contract.molecule_within_all: arithmetic mean; each of 500 molecules has equal weight
aggregation_contract.missing: none; paired pivots drop missing molecules fail-closed in this audit
aggregation_contract.identity_and_fallback: included unchanged; target fallback affects target diagnostics only
aggregation_contract.threshold_equality: distance > 0.0 is outlier; exact lower/upper equality is normal
aggregation_contract.ring_bonds: unique bonds appear once in bond_outlier_rate; ring rate is a subset diagnostic, not an added duplicate
aggregation_contract.bond_count_weighting: no cross-molecule bond-count weighting in the formal Gate
aggregation_contract.floating_comparison: unrounded float64 relative improvement compared directly with 0.10
